name: Cash On Car Titles
description_short: Associated Credit Union offers auto title loans and cash-out options on vehicle equity for members seeking quick access to funds.
description_long: Associated Credit Union (ACU) is a federally-chartered credit union that provides financial services to members, including deposit accounts, lending products, and digital banking tools. The organization operates a physical branch network and online banking platform to serve its membership base. Their auto lending division includes a 'Cash Out On Title' product that allows members to leverage equity in their vehicles. As a credit union, ACU emphasizes membership benefits, competitive rates compared to traditional banks, and personalized service through branch locations and online channels. The company distinguishes itself through credit union status, which typically allows for lower rates and member-focused governance compared to for-profit lenders. Members can access pre-filled applications through online banking and apply for auto loans directly. This limits transparency about specific loan amounts, APR ranges, repayment terms, or the actual mechanics of the title loan product. Prospective borrowers would need to apply or contact the credit union directly to obtain detailed product information.
pros: Credit union structure typically offers lower rates than traditional banks and finance companies
Online application available for existing members with pre-filled forms for faster processing
Multiple banking services available (savings, checking, home loans, personal loans) for one-stop financial needs
Physical branch locations available for in-person service and consultations
Mobile app available for account management and banking convenience
Membership-based governance model aligns lender interests with borrower interests
cons: Website lacks specific APR ranges, loan amounts, or repayment terms for the Cash Out On Title product
Membership requirement may exclude non-members from accessing products
Limited product details available online; borrowers must apply or contact directly for terms
Website navigation heavily emphasizes login/registration rather than product education
best_for: Credit union members with vehicle equity seeking quick access to cash
Existing ACU customers looking to consolidate borrowing into one institution
Borrowers prioritizing credit union rates and member-focused service over alternative lenders
diagnosis: Associated Credit Union is best for existing members who own vehicles with equity and want to access funds through a member-focused institution. The primary limitation is the lack of transparent product terms on their public website—borrowers need direct contact to compare rates and terms against other lenders offering similar title loan products.
services: Auto title loans (Cash Out On Title)
Savings accounts and money market accounts
